record_format.fields: u64 occupancy (LSB=a1) | u8[16] piece nibbles (0..11, low nibble first, ascending squares) | u8 side_to_move | i16 score_cp (stm-relative) | u8 result (0 stm loss / 1 draw / 2 stm win) | u8[4] pad

generation.openings: fixed start position + 1-4 random plies (no book)
generation.filters: quiet positions only (not in check, best move not capture/promo/EP), |score| < 2000cp, first 8 plies skipped, win adjudication at 2000cp sustained 6 plies
generation.engine_code: pre-v1.0 working tree, ~2026-06-24; exact commit not recorded (predates manifest discipline)
generation.hardware: 6 logical cores, Windows 10; depth-based limits are hardware-sensitive

provenance_notes: Recovered retroactively: this dataset was believed deleted but was found intact (sgurr_cpp/data_1..6.bin) and audited 2026-07-01: 97.0% unique positions, ~0.5% cross-shard overlap. nnue/data.bin is the byte-exact concatenation of these six shards (derivable, not archived separately).
